title: Finding the volume of a cylinder given radius and height
problem: Find the volume of a cylinder with radius $3$ cm and height $10$ cm. Give your answer correct to 2 decimal places.

steps.instruction: Write the formula for the volume of a cylinder.

title: Finding the height of a cylinder given its volume and diameter
problem: A cylinder has a diameter of $10$ cm and a volume of $471.24$ cm³. Find the height of the cylinder.

steps.instruction: Find the radius from the diameter.
Write the formula and substitute the known values.

title: Volume of a hollow cylinder
problem: A hollow cylindrical pipe has an outer radius of $6$ cm, an inner radius of $4$ cm, and a length of $15$ cm. Find the volume of material in the pipe correct to 2 decimal places.

steps.instruction: Find the volume of the outer (solid) cylinder.
Find the volume of the inner (hollow) cylinder.
Subtract to find the volume of material.
